<div class="viewcode-block" id="OutputRewriteOptions">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#text2epub.OutputRewriteOptions">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">OutputRewriteOptions</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Opt-in output rewrite applied during :func:`rebuild_epub`.</span>

<span class="sd">    The options describe generic, product-agnostic changes. text2epub does not</span>
<span class="sd">    resolve a target language for a caller and does not interpret injected CSS.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">patch_package_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="n">patch_content_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="n">patch_body_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>

    <span class="n">css_text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">style_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;text2epub-output-policy&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">content_scope</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;replacement-manifest&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;spine&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;spine-and-navigation&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;explicit&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;spine-and-navigation&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">content_hrefs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">inject_css_into_fixed_layout</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span></div>
